<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?> <phpunit backupGlobals="false" backupStaticProperties="false" bootstrap="vendor/autoload.php" cacheDirectory=".phpunit.cache" colors="true" processIsolation="false" stopOnFailure="true" xmlns:xsi="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance" xsi:noNamespaceSchemaLocation="https://schema.phpunit.de/10.5/phpunit.xsd" > <coverage> <report> <html outputDirectory="build/coverage"/> </report> </coverage> <testsuites> <testsuite name="Sluggable Test Suite"> <directory suffix=".php">./tests/</directory> </testsuite> </testsuites> <logging> <junit outputFile="build/report.junit.xml"/> </logging> <source> <include> <directory suffix=".php">src/</directory> </include> </source> </phpunit>
